name: Planner persona is not a project id (hinted tools)
description: A planner/runner/persona phrase should not override the explicit den-mcp project/task routing. This variant appends routing/clarification hints to the fake tool descriptions and project_id schema fields.

input.prompt: Tell planner that den-mcp task 2086 still needs a reviewer look. Use the task thread; don't create a new project or document.

fake_mcp.name: fake-den-mcp-ambiguity-hinted
fake_mcp.source: fixtures/fake-den-mcp/den-mcp-tools.live.json plus curated ambiguity prompts hinted tool descriptions
fake_mcp.safety: Fake fixture only; tool handlers return canned results and must not contact real Den.

tools.name: mcp_den_store_document
tools.description:
Create or update a document. If a document with the same project_id + slug exists, it is overwritten.

TOOL HINT: Use this only to create/update a Den document in a real project or space. If the user says 'den-mcp doc', project_id must be 'den-mcp'. If the user says GoblinBench, project_id must be 'goblinbench'. Do not turn persona phrases such as planner, runner, narrator, or 'den system planner' into a project_id.

project_id.description: Project or space ID. Use '_global' for cross-project docs. TOOL HINT: Use an existing project/space id only. For 'den-mcp' use den-mcp; for GoblinBench use goblinbench. Do not use planner, runner, narrator, channel, or den-system as project_id.

slug.description: Unique slug within the project, e.g. 'damage-system-spec'.

doc_type.description: Document type: prd, spec, adr, convention, reference, note, memory. Default: spec.

tags.description: JSON array of string tags. Accepts a native JSON array or a JSON-encoded string for backward compatibility.

summary.description: Optional short summary for indexing and listing.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_comment_on_document
tools.description:
Add a comment to a document's default discussion thread. If no default thread exists, one is auto-created. For replying to an existing comment, use parent_comment_id. Use get_document_discussion (not get_document) to see comments — discussion is separate from document content.

TOOL HINT: Use this when the user asks to add a discussion comment/note on an existing document. Do not overwrite the document body with store_document for comment requests.

project_id.description: Project or space ID. TOOL HINT: Use an existing project/space id only. For 'den-mcp' use den-mcp; for GoblinBench use goblinbench. Do not use planner, runner, narrator, channel, or den-system as project_id.

author_identity.description: Author identity string (e.g. agent name or username).

parent_comment_id.description: Parent comment ID for replies. Omit for root-level comments.

comment_kind.description: Comment kind: comment, question, answer, resolution, version_note. Default: comment.

mentions.description: JSON array of mentioned identities. Accepts native JSON or JSON-encoded string.

source_refs.description: JSON array of source references. Accepts native JSON or JSON-encoded string.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_send_message
tools.description:
Send a message in a project. Can be project-level, attached to a task, or a reply in a thread.

TOOL HINT: Use this for project/task-thread messages. Keep project_id grounded in an explicit project like 'den-mcp' or 'goblinbench'. Phrases like 'tell planner' describe the recipient/audience/content, not the project_id. For a known task thread, include task_id.

project_id.description: Project ID. TOOL HINT: Use an existing project/space id only. For 'den-mcp' use den-mcp; for GoblinBench use goblinbench. Do not use planner, runner, narrator, channel, or den-system as project_id.

sender.description: Your agent identity, e.g. 'pi' or another manual agent identity.

task_id.description: Attach to a task by ID.

thread_id.description: Reply to an existing message (forms a thread).

metadata.description: Optional JSON metadata object or JSON-encoded string, e.g. {"type":"review_request"}.

intent.description: Optional canonical intent, e.g. review_feedback or handoff.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_task
tools.description:
Get full task details including dependencies, subtasks, and recent messages. Concise by default with bounded recent messages and descriptions; use verbose=true for full detail.

TOOL HINT: Use this read-only lookup before posting to a known task thread when the prompt gives a task id.

verbose.description: If true, return full detail including full description and recent messages. Default is concise.

tools.name: mcp_den_search_documents
tools.description:
Full-text search across documents. Excludes archived documents. Supports AND, OR, NOT, and "phrase" queries. Concise by default with snippets; use verbose=true for full results.

TOOL HINT: Use this before get_document when the user gives a fuzzy document title/name. Search inside the explicitly named project, e.g. GoblinBench -> project_id 'goblinbench'.

project_id.description: Scope search to one project or space. TOOL HINT: Use an existing project/space id only. For 'den-mcp' use den-mcp; for GoblinBench use goblinbench. Do not use planner, runner, narrator, channel, or den-system as project_id.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON records. Default is concise with deep_read_hint.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_document
tools.description:
Get a document's full content by project or space ID and slug. Returns documents regardless of visibility (normal, hidden, archived). Concise by default with content preview; use verbose=true for full content.

TOOL HINT: Use this after search_documents once you know the exact document slug. Do not guess a slug if the prompt only gives a fuzzy title.

project_id.description: Project or space ID. TOOL HINT: Use an existing project/space id only. For 'den-mcp' use den-mcp; for GoblinBench use goblinbench. Do not use planner, runner, narrator, channel, or den-system as project_id.

verbose.description: If true, return full document content. Default is concise with content preview.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_documents
tools.description: List document summaries (without content). Excludes archived documents by default. Omit project_id to list across all projects and spaces. Concise by default; use verbose=true for full document records.

project_id.description: Project or space ID. Omit to list across all projects and spaces. TOOL HINT: Use an existing project/space id only. For 'den-mcp' use den-mcp; for GoblinBench use goblinbench. Do not use planner, runner, narrator, channel, or den-system as project_id.

doc_type.description: Filter by type: prd, spec, adr, convention, reference, note, memory.

tags.description: Filter by tags (comma-separated). Document must have ALL specified tags.

visibility.description: Filter by visibility: normal, hidden, archived. Omit to exclude archived documents.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON records. Default is concise with deep_read_hint.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_document_discussion
tools.description: Get discussion threads and comments for a document. Discussion is separate from document content — use get_document for canonical document JSON without discussion fields. When create_if_missing=false (default) and no default thread exists, returns an empty result. Set create_if_missing=true to auto-create a default thread. Use include_resolved=true to include resolved/archived threads.

project_id.description: Project or space ID. TOOL HINT: Use an existing project/space id only. For 'den-mcp' use den-mcp; for GoblinBench use goblinbench. Do not use planner, runner, narrator, channel, or den-system as project_id.

create_if_missing.description: If true, auto-create a default discussion thread if none exists.

include_resolved.description: If true, include resolved and archived threads in results.

anchor.description: Optional anchor to filter threads by.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON records instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_update_document_visibility
tools.description:
Update a document's visibility to normal, hidden, or archived. Archiving is a status flip — not data movement. Use archive_document_preflight first to check for active references.

TOOL HINT: This is a destructive visibility/status change. If the user says archive OR maybe just add a note/comment, ask a clarification question instead of calling this tool.

project_id.description: Project or space ID. TOOL HINT: Use an existing project/space id only. For 'den-mcp' use den-mcp; for GoblinBench use goblinbench. Do not use planner, runner, narrator, channel, or den-system as project_id.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_update_task
tools.description:
Update a task's fields. Records changes in audit history. When setting status to 'blocked', blocker_summary and blocker_reason are required.

TOOL HINT: Do not use this for task-thread messages or read-only status checks; use get_task and/or send_message instead.

agent.description: Your agent identity (required for audit trail).

status.description: New status: planned, in_progress, review, blocked, done, cancelled.

tags.description: JSON array of string tags. Accepts a native JSON array or a JSON-encoded string for backward compatibility.

blocker_summary.description: Required when status=blocked. Short blocker summary.

blocker_reason.description: Required when status=blocked. Why the agent cannot proceed.

blocker_attempted_remedies.description: Optional when status=blocked. Remedies or evidence of what was attempted.

blocker_suggested_next_step.description: Optional when status=blocked. Suggested next decision or unblock path.

blocker_requires_human_input.description: Optional when status=blocked. Whether human input is required vs planner can replan. Default: false.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_create_project
tools.description:
Register a new project for task management, messaging, and document storage.

TOOL HINT: Never create a new project merely because the prompt mentions a persona, role, planner, runner, or Den system phrase.

id.description: Unique project ID slug, e.g. 'my-project'. Typically the directory name.

root_path.description: Absolute path to the project root on disk.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_project
tools.description: Get a project by ID with summary stats (task counts by status, unread messages).

project_id.description: Project ID. TOOL HINT: Use an existing project/space id only. For 'den-mcp' use den-mcp; for GoblinBench use goblinbench. Do not use planner, runner, narrator, channel, or den-system as project_id.

agent.description: Your agent identity, for unread message count.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_projects
tools.description:
List registered projects. Defaults to normal project-kind spaces only, excluding hidden or archived spaces.

TOOL HINT: Do not list projects when the prompt already names a project unambiguously, such as GoblinBench or den-mcp.

arguments.content: Planner: task 2086 still needs reviewer look.

input.scripted_final_response: Posted a planner-visible handoff on den-mcp task 2086 in the fake fixture.
